theme: Bundle executable orchestrator script for the DB -> API -> Web bottom-up protocol

changes.description: Thin orchestrator that runs DB gate, API gate (via api-validation/scripts/crud-validator.sh), and Web gate (curl --fail -s --max-time 10). Each gate is skippable; first failure exits non-zero. Final line: 'fullstack: db=... api=... web=...'.
Inserted 'Composed runner' paragraph immediately before '## The Bottom-Up Rule' documenting the new orchestrator.

verification.check: dry run with --db-check-cmd=true and no URLs

verification.evidence: exit=1, stdout: 'fullstack: db=fail api=skip web=skip', wrote fullstack-db-check.txt
Frontmatter lines 1-5: name, description, context_priority unchanged.
122 lines including comment header and blank lines; logic body is within budget.

design_notes: Script resolves crud-validator via BASH_SOURCE so it works regardless of caller cwd.
Summary line is always printed on both success and failure paths so callers can parse it uniformly.
DB gate is explicitly skipped only when DB_CHECK_CMD is literal 'true' (the default), per spec.
Web gate uses curl --fail -s --max-time 10 as specified, saves body to $EVIDENCE_DIR/fullstack-web-index.html, and records http_code to a .status sidecar.
